divisions.title: Encouragement in Persecution
divisions.summary: Thanksgiving for perseverance, God will judge persecutors and give relief to the afflicted

divisions.title: The Day of the Lord
divisions.summary: Don't be deceived about the Lord's return, the rebellion and man of lawlessness must come first, stand firm

divisions.title: Practical Exhortations
divisions.summary: Prayer for the gospel's spread, warning against idleness, keep away from idle believers, do not grow weary

chapterSummaries.1: Thanksgiving for perseverance, God's righteous judgment, relief and glory
chapterSummaries.2: The day of the Lord, the man of lawlessness, stand firm in truth
chapterSummaries.3: Pray for the gospel's spread, warning against idleness, do not grow weary
